skill.name: Python for Data Science
skill.description: Application of Python programming for data analysis, machine learning, and statistical modeling using libraries such as pandas, scikit-learn, and NumPy

proficiencyLevel.name: Advanced
proficiencyLevel.description: Independently builds end-to-end data pipelines and ML models in Python with production-quality code

skill.name: Statistical Modeling
skill.description: Design and application of statistical models including regression, classification, and hypothesis testing for data-driven decision making

proficiencyLevel.name: Intermediate
proficiencyLevel.description: Applies standard statistical models with routine independence and interprets results correctly

skill.name: Data Visualization
skill.description: Creation of clear, effective visual representations of data using tools such as matplotlib, seaborn, Tableau, and D3.js

proficiencyLevel.name: Advanced
proficiencyLevel.description: Designs compelling, accurate visualizations that communicate complex data insights to diverse audiences

skill.name: SQL for Data Analysis
skill.description: Writing complex SQL queries for data extraction, transformation, and analysis across relational databases

proficiencyLevel.name: Expert
proficiencyLevel.description: Recognized authority in SQL, capable of optimizing complex queries, designing schemas, and mentoring others
